commands.command: vp run app#build # should build the app from root

commands: ls packages/app/dist # should have the build output
vp run app#build 2>&1 | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache from root
cd packages/app && vp run build 2>&1 | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache from sub dir

commands.command: cd packages/app && vp build 2>&1 # direct vp build should not be cached

commands: cd packages/app && vp build 2>&1 | grep -c 'cache' || echo 'no cache' # direct vp build has no cache
vp run app#build 2>&1 | grep 'cache miss' # should miss cache after source change

commands.command: cd packages/web && vp run build # should build from sub dir first

commands: ls packages/web/dist # should have the build output
cd packages/web && vp run build 2>&1 | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache from sub dir
vp run web#build 2>&1 | grep 'cache hit' # should hit cache from root after sub dir build
